ValidationRule.description: Bank Account Cannot contain spaces or non number charactors
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( LEN( sirenum__Payment_Account__c )>8, LEN(sirenum__Payment_Account__c )<8, CONTAINS(sirenum__Payment_Account__c , "/"), CONTAINS(sirenum__Payment_Account__c , " "), CONTAINS(sirenum__Payment_Account__c , "-") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Bank Account Number must not contain spaces and must be 8 digits
